title: ornithogalum angolense
intro: Ornithogalum angolense, also known as the Angolan star flower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is native to southern Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Ornithogalum angolense is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other illnesses.
